payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Tall, narrow dark-brown wooden cabinet door with a single recessed rectangular panel and molded frame, semi-matte finish with minor scuffs near the bottom; the right edge is cropped and the door appears within about 0.8 m of the camera.

message.content: {"label":"cabinet","short_description":"dark wooden cabinet edge-crop","long_description":"Tall, narrow dark-brown wooden cabinet door with a single recessed rectangular panel and molded frame, semi-matte finish with minor scuffs near the bottom; the right edge is cropped and the door appears within about 0.8 m of the camera.","attributes":["dark brown","wood grain","recessed rectangular panel","molded frame","tall and narrow","semi-matte finish","minor scuffs/wear at base","right-edge cropped/partial"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.8}
